description_long: This is a low-top sneaker with a predominantly black upper, featuring a smooth leather-like material and a brown rubber sole. The heel tab is white with a prominent Adidas Trefoil logo and 'Stan Smith' branding in black. The shoe has a classic lace-up design with black laces and subtle perforations forming three stripes on the side. The tongue displays a branded label, and the overall silhouette is streamlined and casual. Visible wear and scuffing are present on the toe and sole, indicating regular use.
description: A black low-top sneaker with a brown sole, white branded heel tab, and visible signs of wear.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe, black laces, and branded tongue label.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the perforated three-stripe design and the brown sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the white heel tab with the Adidas Trefoil logo and 'Stan Smith' branding.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the perforated stripes and worn brown sole.
attribute_logo: Black Adidas Trefoil logo on the white heel tab
